---
title: "Updates"
---

## Presentation

I will be participating as a panelist at the **Puerto Rico Sports Performance Summit** on May 15.

**Details at**

[Puerto Rico Sports Performance Summit](https://www.prsportsperformancesummit.com/product/el-futuro-del-deporte-panel-discussion-may-15-/6RJ357ZRELHSRHBCWGDCF7CT?cs=true&cst=custom){target="\_blank"}

## Future

1. Graduation is coming...

2. Base Running Science... loading...
